feed.title: SAP Community - SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
feed.subtitle: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Role Name and Family from Job Profile Builder on Employee Profile/EC/Job Info
entry.content:
Hi all, 

We use Job Profile Builder to manage Job Roles and Families. We use Employee Central where everyone has a job code/job classification, which is mapped to the relevant 'Role' entity:

  • Employee has a job code/job classification
  • Job code/job classification is mapped to a Role
  • The Role has a Family as one of its attributes

Each Role entity has a Role Name and belongs to a Family in JPB. What I'd like to know is, is it possible for this Role Name and Family Name to be mapped back to the employee's job info on their employee profile? Family is the main one we're interested in. We also have several downstream integrations where we would like to include the Family as part of the integration file. So we're just exploring what's in the art of the possible currently, and wanted to see if anyone in the community had done something like this already. 

(Another consideration is whether it's possible for the JPB Role Name and Role Family to be brought through into the Position object once the job code has been populated)

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Work Schedule Upload
entry.content:
Hello All

We are trying to upload work schedules for employees (Master data upload) using the template (object work schedule) from import and export data.

The error is '’Template contains more than one association.’’

 Please let us know if the template selection is correct or if any modification is required.

Some one please suggest is there any direct data import template for employee workschedule? or any other templete like Job information related need to be used to import employee work schedule data 

Reg

SK

entry.title: SF EC payslip pay period warning message
entry.content:
Hi dear experts,

We are facing an warning message when click on pay statement. Pay statement can be seen without a problem however a warning message pops up we want to get rid of this warning message. Systems are EC and s4 Hana (not ECP)

All advices are welcome. (Please see the attachment)

Warning message is as it shown below; 

""Warning

We are having trouble displaying your pay periods. Please contact your system administrator and provide the details below:
Error Code: 001
Error Message: undefined
Root Cause: undefined""

entry.title: Second Manager Import in Job relationship - Error: User cannot be their own manager
entry.content:
Hi All

In our current process we maintain Second Manager (Comp Planner) in Job Relationship. In some cases the User himself is their own comp planner.

Until last year we were able to use this solution and import the data successfully in Job Relationship. But after the 1H2024 release SAP has added a validation that User cannot be their own manager. (https://me.sap.com/notes/3460009/E)

We're ready to launch the forms, but we've encountered an error. Has anyone seen this before? If so, what's the best workaround?

Thank you

Viswa

entry.title: Error code 067(PG),
Cutover for EC and Time Off
entry.content:
Hello All

We are preparing for Cutover activities (Test) with a full load. We are almost done with EC. For time off, we are stuck with the template to import employee data for the work schedule. Could you please advise is there any template available for Employee work schedule data import, or do we need to do it in employee Job data import 

 

Reg

SK

entry.title: pay range in position
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to configure pay ranges on position by following below instructions as mentioned in this

KBA - 2458839 - How to Configure Pay Range in Positions - Employee Central - SAP for Me

how ever I see pay range is displayed on the fly before entering the values at position, but I do not see pay range getting displayed once after position has saved.

I have configured the business rule as shown below

I have saved the rule under manage data - object configuration as shown below

I have saved the rule also under configure object definitions - position - company field as shown below

with this configuration steps in place, now that I am trying to either create a new position or modify an existing position under manage data tool. as you can see pay range is also getting displayed

but once the position creation is done, the value at pay range disappears unfortunately.

Any reason what was missing here?

entry.title: connection options between S/4 Hana Private Cloud and SSFF?
entry.content:
Is there any other option besides SAP Ruter to integrate S/4 Hana Private Cloud and SAP SuccessFactors (SSFF) and if so, what would it be?

Is it possible to do it with CPI?

entry.title: Push data using a custom MDF to HRIS element
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I want to check possible ways to push data from a custom MDF (not a user type) to compensation information for affected target population.

The MDF is acting as a look up table that has 3 fields - location, employee class and special factor.

Based on location and employee class, I want to update special factor in compensation information, whenever there is change in the factor value in the MDF.

Please feel free to ask or suggest on this.

Thank you!

entry.title: SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Is it possible to fetch data from SAP SuccessFactors's Trial version using APIs?
or
We have to purchase one?

entry.title: Company Structure Configuration
entry.content:
Hi,

could you please advise why in the "Company Structure Overview" the positions are displayed twice, once under position of Supervisor and once under Department?

Thank you and regards,

Aneta

SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central

entry.title: Relief as custom field in Employee Time
entry.content: I have created a custom user field (Relief) in the Employee Time UI. Using the Absence Validation rule, how do I create a rule that will identify and raise a warning message if the Relief is on leave when the user is creating time off.

entry.title: SuccessFactors EC. Position Management change manager and department via action
entry.content:
We have implemented SF Employee Central position management.  An issue we have encountered is updating department and supervisor for the employee and keeping the job information and the position in sync.  The answered we have received is if the department and supervisor change, the change must be completed via the position and not via an action on the employee.  We are wondering how other companies handle this when enabling Manager Self Service.  We don't want managers updating position records.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Missing Infotype IT0709 and IT9901 for Some Employees During SF to SAP HCM Replication
entry.content:
Hi SAP Expert ,

We are experiencing an issue where IT0709 (External Data) and IT9901 (Organizational Assignment) are not created in SAP HCM when certain employee records are replicated from SuccessFactors Employee Central via CPI. This issue does not affect all employees but only a few cases. As a result, these employees have incomplete records, leading to downstream issues in payroll, reporting, and organizational assignments.

What is the best practice for error handling in CPI to prevent incomplete data transfer? Should we implement an Exception Subprocess to retry failed records?

We are using the predefined iFlow:
"Replicate Employee Master Data and Organizational Assignments from SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central to SAP ERP or SAP S/4HANA."

Are there any SAP Notes or best practices specifically for handling missing infotypes due to failed SuccessFactors-to-SAP HCM replication?

Thank you

BR

entry.title: Maximum number of character of a file name in SSF
entry.content:
Hello Community,

we would like to know which is the maximum number of character of a file name related to an attachment in SSF (E.G. Onboarding document).

Thank you

Giulia

entry.title: Is it possible to extract quick actions from Success factors with the deeplinks into Excel file?
entry.content: Is it possible to extract quick actions from Success factors with the deeplinks into Excel file?

entry.title: Validation of time off request Workflow approval status in Business Rule
entry.content:
Hi experts

Need to quick advise/suggestion,

We have a requirement, on Unpaid Leave. 

Requirement:- Unpaid leave has to applied when a user exhaust his/her annual leave balance. If a person is applying for "Unpaid Leave", system should validate certain checks as,

1. Annual leave balance has to be "0" when "Unpaid Leave" is requested

2. Initiated "Annual Leave" request has to be in "Approved" Status when "Unpaid Leave" is requested. 

If both conditions are not true then system should through error and "Submit" button has to be greyed out else user can submit the request. 

We could able to configure the validation on annual leave balance check but we couldn't able to validate the "Annual Leave" historical transactions to validate the approval status when "Unpaid Leave" is applied.

 

Looking forward for suggestion, is it feasible to configure?

 

Thanks

Arun

entry.title: User Info portlet in the Latest People Profile
entry.content:
Hello,

Can you please advise how we can find or configure the visibility of legacy User Info portlet data in the Latest People Profile?

Thank you.

Best regards,

Martina

entry.title: EC Time Off accrual calculation: consider Saturday on the full monthe of absences
entry.content:
hi, 

in my company we calculate monthly holiday accruals. If there is absences on the entire month there is no accrual calculation. I used the the function "Get Absence In Days For Period Based On Calendar Days For Time Types()" and it works well. 

How ever, if the absence starts on sunday for example, and Saturday is the first day of the month (and same if Saturday is the last day of the month) and saturday is a non working day (according the work schedule), the entire month should be considered. 

here the rule I cretated: 

How Can I make sur to catch the saturdays (the non working days) in my calculation, as currently only the full month of absences are catched?

Thanks in advance for your advice!

Sevda

entry.title: Monthly Time Sheet - Error When employee records more than 20 hours OT
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We come across common requirement to throw error when using time containers, Like after 20 Hours of OT, employee should not be able to submit. Currently we are able to raise the alerts but we need to stop them from proceeding. Is there any possibility to throw error or will be available anytime in future ?

Thanks in Advance!

Thanks,
Vijey
